4.q: enhanced expression of SA- and JA-associated genes (NtPR1, NtPR2, NtPR4, NtPR5 and NtPDF1.2) in transgenic tobacco overexpressing SpWRKY1

5.q: Sp-miR396a-5p overexpression enhanced osmoregulation and decreased production of reactive oxygen species (ROS).
